title: Verify whether commit 1c8023c7 in /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config satisfies the handoff in ~/.claude/cache/handoff-phase0-codex.md and the spec ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md. Focus on code/spec conformance in the two target files only. Return findings first with fi...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. Low: `2048 bytes` upper bound is not strictly guaranteed in one edge case. In [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:317`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:317), when content is still oversized, code sets `content = header` at [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:318`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:318) but does not enforce `header <= 2048`. So a very long `project`/metadata header can violate the spec’s hard byte cap. No other spec/handoff conformance issues found in the two target files. **Conformance verified** 1. `writeDelegationContext()` exists, uses secret redaction, recursive dir creation, and atomic temp-write + rename: [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:289`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:289), [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:292`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:292), [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:290`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:290), [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:321`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:321). 2. `codex`/`codex-spark` get `--auto-context` and `--delegation-context-file`; non-codex providers are not given these flags: [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:360`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:360), [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:356`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:356). 3. Delegation context file is created before spawn in `runSingleAttempt()`: [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:428`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:428). 4. `delegate.js` adds `--delegation-context-file` parsing and usage/help text: [`delegate.js:212`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:212), [`delegate.js:228`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:228). 5. `collectAutoContext()` prioritizes explicit delegation file, falls back to fixed path, and skips stale mismatched `run_id`: [`delegate.js:392`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:392), [`delegate.js:398`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:398), [`delegate.js:400`](/tmp/review-1c8023c7/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:400).
